scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n shared,server,web -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @codex-web-agent/shared" "npm run dev -w @codex-web-agent/server" "npm run dev -w @codex-web-agent/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @codex-web-agent/shared && npm run build -w @codex-web-agent/server && npm run build -w @codex-web-agent/web
